Сhecklist.
Before creating an issue, I performed...

□ Install the latest version of the mod with logging (LOG) enabled.

Immediately after the error or failure occurred, I copied and attached the following logs to my report:
□ IHavok.log
□ Ikenshi.log
□ Ikenshi_info.log
□ IMyGUI.log
□ IRE_Kenshi_log.txt
□ Isave.log
